Off Calendar Sep-23-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joseph Haselton for Andres Vasquez.

Mr. Haselton informed the Court that he wanted to transfer the matter and requested a continuance to file a petition for a change of venue. The Court stated that the accounting appeared to be in order and granted the petition, (subject to a written order). Status on the petition for change of venue is set for December 15, 2008.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Padilla, CSR 975. Clerk: R. Noguera/ J. Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy T. Aguerre.
